name: Baizhu
description:
“A Breath of Liyue”

You had been born with an illness that hindered you from being able to live a normal life, Baizhu however decided it was time for you to live that life.

💚

Artist for pfp: BCfish707

🌿

Note:

I cannot control the bots. So if it starts acting up then please don’t blame me.

Also if you wish to request for a bot then check my bio for the link to a form.

💊

I still remember when I got Baizhu, I purposely ran around with him to see if he actually coughed while sprinting and then afterwards I felt bad so I switched to another character. It was still entertaining though because honestly I didn’t believe he actually did cough while sprinting until then.

🐍
